_about: Expected analytical outputs for test_data/dei.xlsx, verified against independent Python (pandas/scipy) computations on 2026-05-23. If the site produces numbers that drift from these by more than rounding error, something is broken in the analysis code.

validity_factor_analysis._note_loadings: Sign of loadings can be inverted depending on factor extraction direction; absolute values are what matter.

comparison_anova_gender._filter_note: Site excludes single-respondent gender groups. Comparison uses Man, Woman, Non-binary (N=148).
